message:
test(fcp-core): pin PcsEventType + ResumeReasonCode serde matrix (flywheel_connectors-ifkle)

Bead asks for ZoneEvent serde tag JSON+CBOR roundtrip. fcp-core has
no type literally named ZoneEvent; the event-shaped classifier
surface covers many already-pinned enums (ConnectorEvent by
connector_event_serde_tags.rs, EventSeverity by
event_severity_ordering.rs, OrderingPolicy by
schedule_policy_variant_matrix.rs). Two unpinned event-type
classifiers in the zone-event surface:
- PcsEventType (pcs.rs:463) — 6 variants for PCS audit logging
  (GroupCreated/EpochAdvanced/MemberAdded/MemberRemoved/
  ZoneKeyDerived/CompromiseRecovery) with rename_all snake_case
- ResumeReasonCode (connector_state.rs:1201) — 8 variants for
  timeline events emitted during checkpoint export, handoff, and
  resume (CheckpointExported/HandoffAuthorized/CheckpointFresh/
  CheckpointStale/DuplicateClassified/ResumeAccepted/ResumeDenied/
  EvidenceConflict) with rename_all snake_case

Both are canonical "zone event" classifiers operators see in zone
audit logs (PCS group lifecycle + resume timeline).

Coverage:
- PcsEventType per-variant JSON tag (group_created/epoch_advanced/
  member_added/member_removed/zone_key_derived/compromise_recovery)
  with PCS-audit regression sentinel
- PcsEventType JSON+CBOR round-trip; CBOR-as-Text; PascalCase +
  camelCase + kebab-case + cross-vocabulary rejected; 6-variant
  count + pairwise distinct
- ResumeReasonCode per-variant JSON tag (checkpoint_exported/
  handoff_authorized/checkpoint_fresh/checkpoint_stale/
  duplicate_classified/resume_accepted/resume_denied/
  evidence_conflict) with resume-timeline regression sentinel
- ResumeReasonCode JSON+CBOR round-trip; CBOR-as-Text; 8-variant
  count + pairwise distinct; PascalCase + kebab-case + unknown
  rejected
- Multi-word variants use underscore (group_created/zone_key_derived/
  compromise_recovery; checkpoint_exported/duplicate_classified/
  evidence_conflict) — no camelCase or hyphens
- Cross-enum: PcsEventType and ResumeReasonCode use disjoint token
  spaces (operator dashboards reading both PCS and resume audit
  streams MUST distinguish event types by token alone)
- Token format invariants: every event token is snake_case
  lowercase ASCII non-empty with no leading/trailing/double
  underscore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
